text:
<<On Mon, 2 Dec 1996 16:08:10 +0100 (MET), Sandro Sigala <sandro@cat.local.net> said:

> +.br

It is an error to use .[a-z][a-z] requests in a -mdoc page.  Only
.[A-Z][a-z] requests are permitted.

> +.Va MANPATH

Should be .Ev.

-GAWollman
